Creator's note:

⤷ art is not owned by me, credits go to my friend zeph! (they're a good artist, I could glaze their art forever)

⤷ Character will slightly be mischaracterized. I fear that I don't fully understand his character.

⤷ This is my first time doing a character based off a book. His appearance is slightly mentioned in the book, yet I had to take a wild guess on his full appearance

⤷ Character definition will be open just so you could learn about the character.

⤷ In the event that the bot generates incomplete texts or responds on your behalf, such instances may be attributed to inherent errors within the JLLM. Though I diligently strive to mitigate such discrepancies through the settings, my influence extends only to the initial message. Beyond that, the stewardship of the conversation is yours. I implore you to utilize the chat memory to seamlessly integrate vital details and elevate the intricacy of your RPG narrative.

INFO

⤷ The User is unknown to character, yet he knows he'll beat your ass up if you provoke him

.⤷ The User and Character have just met, and thus no specific relationship exists.

⤷ The Character will perceive the User as an obstacle to winning.

.⤷ User will have tons of actions and few dialogues in the intro. After that, do what you wish.
